==Card Redemption==
Throughout [[Murika]], cards can be collected and exchanged for various rewards. Cards vary from tier 1 (white) to tier 5 (orange) and there's different types of each tier. Below is a list of the rewards that can be exchanged, and how many times.

==Tier 1 (White)==
'''Recommended:''' Enhancement Injection, Gears
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:Bullet white.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Bullet
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
| rowspan="7" | 11 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Murika INTEL +1,500
|-
|3x1||2k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +5
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|Smoothbore]]
|-
|6x1||[[Gear|Tactical Boots]]
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket +1
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:Window System.png|75x75px]]
|Window System||3x1||400 W-tads||200 B-tads
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:Huullywood.png|75x75px]]
|Huullywood||4x1||4k B-tads||200 B-tads
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:The Five-sided.png|75x75px]]
|The Five-sided||4x1||Travel Speedup +1h||Murika INTEL +340
|}

==Tier 2 (Green)==
'''Recommended:'''  Enhancement Injection, Gear
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:Bullet green.png|framless|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Bullet
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail HP +100<br>Snail RUSH +10
| rowspan="7" | 33 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Murika INTEL +3,000
|-
|3x1||4,000 B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +5
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:#40da25;">Tactical Vest</span>]]
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest +40
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:Empire Building.png|75x75px]]
|Empire Building||3x1||6k B-tads||Offering Speedup +4m
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:Copper Gate Bridge.png|75x75px]]
|Copper Gate Bridge||3x1||[[Gone with the Wind|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Gone with the Wind</span>]] +10
|Refine Speedup +4m
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:Area 51.png|75x75px]]
|Area 51||4x1||Mutant Cell +2,000
|Evolution Chest +1
|}

==Tier 3 (Blue)==
'''Recommended:'''  Enhancement Injection, Gear
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:Bullet blue.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" |Bullet
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail DEF +12<br>Snail RUSH +12
| rowspan="7" | 99 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Murika INTEL +4,500
|-
|3x1||6k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">PASGT Helmet</span>]]
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest +60
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket +3
|-
| style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:Aircraft Carrier.png|75x75px]]
|Aircraft Carrier||3x2||Refine Speedup +4h
|Mecha Cell +100
|-
| style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:Yankee.png|75px]]
|Yankee||4x1||400 W-tads
|10 W-tads
|}

==Tier 4 (Purple)==
'''Recommended:'''  Enhancement Injection, Gear
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:Bullet purple.png|75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Bullet
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail HP +140<br>Snail ATK +14
| rowspan="7" | 297 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Murika INTEL +6,000
|-
|3x1||8k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Expert Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:#ee96d5;">Long Range Scope</span>]]
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest +80
|-
|7x2||Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:Internet.png|75px]]
|Internet||3x1||Expert Scroll +20
|Gene Speedup +5m
|-
| style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" |[[File:Uncle Simon.png|75px]]
|Uncle Simon||4x1||Murikan Treasure Map +50
|Murikan Treasure Map +2
|-
| style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:West Dot Manual.png|75px]]
|West Dot Manual||4x2||Gear Chest +100
|Gear Chest +1
|}

==Tier 5 (Orange)==
'''Recommended:''' 
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="6" style="background-color:#ffb066;" | [[File:Bullet orange.png|75px]]
| rowspan="6" | Bullet
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail HP +160<br>Snail RUSH +16
| rowspan="6" | 891 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Murika INTEL +8,000
|-
|3x1||10k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Master Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||Gear Chest +100
|-
|6x2||Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:#ffb066;" | [[File:Grey House.png|75px]]
|Grey House||3x1||Wish Coin +1
|15 W-tads
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Murika]]
